title: Reuse dashboard warning/alert components for evaluation-level red flags
description:
## Summary
Reuse the dashboard's existing warning/alert presentation patterns for evaluation-level misclassification red flags.

## Deliverables
- Surface evaluation-level flags using an established warning/error visual treatment.
- Keep the visual treatment coherent with existing dashboard report and evaluation warning patterns.
- Define how multiple flags are summarized without overwhelming the evaluation view.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: replace custom evaluation red-flag cards in EvaluationTask with shared ui/alert components (severity-aware) to match established dashboard warning patterns.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation: npm --prefix dashboard run build:fast passed after alert-component integration.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented: EvaluationTask red flags now use shared ui/alert components instead of custom cards. Severity mapping uses destructive alerts for high severity and default alerts for medium/low severity.
